assertions.assertion: Program.cs contains ForwardedHeaders configuration with XForwardedFor and XForwardedProto
assertions.rationale: Standard ASP.NET Core reverse proxy knowledge

assertions.assertion: Program.cs restricts KnownProxies to the proxy IP address 10.0.0.1 and does not accept forwarded headers from any source
assertions.rationale: Best practice to restrict KnownProxies is somewhat known

assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures HSTS with MaxAge of at least 365 days and IncludeSubDomains = true
Program.cs calls UseForwardedHeaders() before UseHttpsRedirection() and UseIdentityServer() in the middleware pipeline
Program.cs uses StatusCodes.Status308PermanentRedirect or equivalent 308 status code for HTTPS redirection
assertions.rationale: Without skill, an LLM might use 301 or not specify the status code explicitly; 308 is a specific recommendation
